body:
Spectrum78 Mod Introduction (Simplified Chinese)
 
We have added a host of intriguing mobs and biomes that do not appear in the current version of The Broken Script, along with unique biological phenomena tied to them. Highly recommended: Install Geckolib for NeoForge 21.1.165 or above – this will definitely prevent collision issues.
 
Core Focus
 
A spin-off mod exclusively designed for Minecraft’s horror mod The Broken Script (TBS), aiming to resurrect the unreleased mobs that were cut from TBS’s development.
 
Key Features
 
1. 1:1 Restoration of Unreleased Mobs
Resurrect 4 cut mobs from TBS’s development archives, including the Breaker, the Observer, the Conqueror and the Static Fool. All models, textures, sounds and core mechanics are restored exactly from TBS’s original design files with no additional modifications.
2. Seamless Compatibility with TBS
Preserve TBS’s signature slow-burning psychological horror atmosphere. Works flawlessly with the base TBS mod and is compatible with Project Information and sound enhancement mods.
3. Genuine Lore Expansion
These abandoned entities fill the lore gaps in TBS’s horrifying world, offering players a unique exploratory experience of unearthing forbidden content.
